aesthetic_archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast / Editorial Finance (Bloomberg, The Ken)

typography.strategy: Scale Dissonance + Dense Data. Use a high-contrast serif for major editorial headlines, and a highly legible, sterile grotesque/mono for all tabular data, forms, and standard UI.
rules: Never use generic Inter for headings.
Headings should use Playfair Display ONLY for major page titles or editorial sections (like /about, /methodology).
For dashboards, tables, and broker cards, use IBM Plex Sans entirely to maintain data clarity.
Use 'tabular-nums' utility class strictly on all numeric data cells.

colors.palette_strategy: Editorial/Print constraint. Mostly stark white canvas, absolute black ink, with a single striking accent color and muted functional colors.

visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px borders aggressively to structure the page (border-collapse on tables, dividers between metrics). Use absolute black (border-black) for major thematic separations, and hairline gray (border-[#E5E5DF]) for internal grid lines.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Strictly NONE. Rely entirely on borders for component separation. This is a print-inspired, 'flat' aesthetic.
visual_enhancers.radii: Very sharp. Override Shadcn default radius to 0px (rounded-none) or 2px (rounded-sm) maximum.
visual_enhancers.surfaces: Solid flat colors only. NO glassmorphism. Data must never refract.

component_rules.general: Strip away Shadcn's 'SaaS' defaults (soft shadows, rounded corners, muddy grays). Make it look like a printed financial report.
component_rules.tables: Hero components. Tables should span full width, use border-y on headers, tight padding (py-2 px-3). Headers must be IBM Plex Sans, text-[11px] uppercase.
component_rules.broker_cards: Do not build 'floating' cards. Use a CSS Grid (Bento) approach where cards share 1px borders (border-collapse style) to look like a contiguous ledger.
component_rules.forms_and_inputs: Inputs should have rounded-none, sharp 1px borders, and focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black focus:border-black (no soft blue rings).
component_rules.verification_badges: First-class UI elements. Small, pill-shaped or sharp rectangular, with a 1px border. MUST include a small icon (lucide-react) mapping to the status.

grids_and_layouts.spacing: Intentional. Use tight spacing (gap-4) for data clusters (like a calculator form), but massive spacing (py-20) between distinct editorial sections.
grids_and_layouts.calculator_layout: Split screen or heavy asymmetric grid (e.g., md:grid-cols-12). Left side (col-span-4): Form inputs. Right side (col-span-8): Calculation Summary and Breakdown Table.
grids_and_layouts.ledger_layout: Full bleed or constrained wide container (max-w-7xl). The data table IS the UI.

rules: Hover states should be fast (100ms) background darkens or border thickens.
No bounce or spring animations. No parallax.
Accordion and Tabs (Shadcn) should use default instant or fast-ease transitions.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for all text. The text_primary on background exceeds 15:1.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements, form inputs, buttons, and verification badges MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'data-testid="calculate-mtf-button"').

media.icons: Use 'lucide-react'. Stroke width 1.5. Keep icons small (14px or 16px) to match data-dense aesthetic.

images.description: Detailed close-up of a newspaper displaying global financial market statistics. Use purely as a faint, low-opacity background texture in the Hero or About page.
Person analyzing financial charts on a desk. Good for the 'Guides' or 'Methodology' header to establish analytical credibility.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: Ensure Google Fonts (@import or link) for 'Playfair Display' and 'IBM Plex Sans' are injected into index.html or global css.
Update tailwind.config.js: Overwrite border radii to 0, configure the exact editorial color tokens provided in this JSON.
Data structure: Setup the MTF logic for Kotak Neo with clear 'Demonstration data / Review Required' badges on the rates.
Implement the Layout: Build the top navigation with the editorial 1px bottom border. Do not use a hamburger menu on desktop.
Routing: Set up React Router for the massive structure (/, /calculator, /brokers, /compare, /ledger, /tariffs, /methodology, etc).
Ledger state: Implement local storage persistence for the /ledger route as explicitly requested.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: NO EMOJIS in UI. Use lucide-react icons.
No generic centered landing page tropes. Left-align text. Use severe, Swiss-style typography.
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes are placed on EVERYTHING interactive (buttons, tabs, inputs, table rows).
Avoid 'transition: all'. Explicitly animate transform/opacity/background-color if needed.
Do not build HTML-based components for tabs, selects, popovers, or tables—use Shadcn UI primitives but heavily style them for the print-aesthetic (sharp corners, thin borders).
